name: Float
description: Float is commonly used to support accounting workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Float when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in accounting work.
founderWorkflow: Use Float to keep accounting work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Float before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
